rationale.D1: Confirmed timed-robot pattern with a custom SubsystemBase; TalonFX motors instantiated directly inside each subsystem (LiftSubsystem:52-55, ClimberSubsystem, IntakeSubsystem); CTRE TunerConstants provides a vendored swerve abstraction for drive only — no *IO interfaces exist anywhere in this repo.
rationale.D2: Confirmed per-subsystem state enums (LiftStates, DriveState, IntakeStates, ClimberStates) with switch-case FSMs in each subsystem's calculate(); TeleopController fans state changes across subsystems, but there is no single Superstructure coordinator with a goal-request API — each subsystem manages its own FSM independently.
rationale.D3: simulationPeriodic() exists in Robot.java:125 but its body contains only two commented-out lines; the 'simlib' package (SimLimelight, SimPID, etc.) is a team utility library not WPILib physics simulation — no ElevatorSim, ArmSim, or DCMotorSim found anywhere in the repo.
rationale.D4: No src/test directory exists; CI build.yml runs './gradlew build' only; no @Test annotations or assertEquals calls anywhere — no evidence of any unit or integration tests.
rationale.D5: 186 SmartDashboard.put* calls scattered throughout subsystems (Drive:198-213, LiftSubsystem:418-428, etc.); no AdvantageKit, DogLog, Epilogue, or structured logging found — pure Level 1 dashboard telemetry.
rationale.D6: No PathPlanner (.path/.auto) or Choreo (.traj/.chor) files found in the repo; autonomous navigation uses a custom PID-to-odometry-pose system (DriveToPoint:97-102) reading CTRE's built-in pose estimator, plus Limelight vision servoing for reef alignment (DriveToReef) — sophisticated custom auto but no trajectory library.
rationale.D7: Confirmed three Limelights with addVisionMeasurement called via TunerConstants.Drivetrain.addVisionMeasurement() in Drive.java:1111; velocity gating applied (angular>90deg or speed>0.2 rejected at line 1101-1109); std dev set to zeros (no tuning); Limelight tx/ty servoing also used for reef auto-alignment.
rationale.D8: Real README with structural explanation, GitHub Actions for build + Google Java Format CI (format.yml), PR template present; 4 seasons tracked; simlib is an internal cross-year utility library but not a separately versioned/consumed dependency.
